programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company while Matt and Ronnie take on childrens book vendors who are up to no good

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Cult It Out Lou

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: Rollin Plains
programme.desc: Its cattlemen versus sheepmen and Trigger Gargan appears to be the leader of the gang causing the trouble But unknown to Ranger Tex Lawrence the respected town citizen Barrow is the boss and is tipping off the gang as to the Rangers activities

programme.title: The Gun and the Pulpit
programme.desc: After narrowly escaping a lynch mob atheist gunslinger Ernie Parsons Marjoe Gortner steals the identity of a murdered preacher and takes his job in a western town Ernie falls for the beautiful Sally Underwood Pamela Sue Martin and becomes attached to the town hes come to think of as his sanctuary So when his new home is threatened by a tyrannical land baron Ernie must use both his extensive skills as a gunfighter and his minimal skills as a preacher to defend the townspeople

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Bonanza 307
programme.desc: Bonanza 307

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Arte investigate the early predictions of a friends death Before they can warn the next victim they discover a plot underway to murder all the world leaders and replace them with look-alikes

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being shot Kimble is reunited with Sister Veronica whose help he needs to track down a lead about the one-armed man

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike investigates sabotage of a turbo-electric dam located in a desert area of a small country

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike takes on a possible suicide mission when he agrees to swim with a fire hose through an underwater intake pipe into a burning warehouse filled with combustible chemicals

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: A goofy bombardier Lt who always hits his mark joins Gen Savages crew and finds out the hard way that real people are killed when bombs drop

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Feeling David is psychologically disturbed Elizabeth plans to send him away so Carolyn takes it upon herself to investigate the basement of the old house Meanwhile Julia offers to let an aged Barnabas suck her blood

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Now under the control of Barnabas Carolyn is promised eternal life Meanwhile Barnabas insists Julias treatments cease

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Carolyn tries to discredit Davids stories about Barnabas and Sarah Julia hypnotizes Vicki a second time to prevent Barnabas from making her his new Josette

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Joe and Victoria realize theres something amiss about Carolyn Carolyn suspects Julia has interfered with Barnabass plans for Vicki

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Micki and Ryan search for a cursed scarecrow that may be responsible for murder

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Cathy wants a rich and successful life and fast She visits a medium who tells her she will meet a man who will inherit a lot of money and die in a violent way soon after When she meets grossly overweight Charlie who informs her of his rich relatives she promptly marries him As it turns out the medium is always right

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A young gigolo stays with a washed up film director and his lonely abused wife on an isolated island

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A faux blind woman uses a young man obsessed with her to get rid of her husband

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A parole officer is Nicks prime suspect in a murder investigation until the suspect nearly becomes the next victim

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Happy begins sleep-walking due to his insecurity with women Binghamton orders him to be psychiatrically evaluated and shipped out if found unfit for duty So McHale and the guys try to help their Shipmate by fixing him up with a pretty Nurse but must first get around Binghamtons No Fraternization rule

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: The 73 Crews heart-sick Japanese friend Fuji must get a letter to his best girl back home in Japan But a secret mission to mail the letter from a Japanese-held island becomes complicated when Fujis letter gets mixed up in Binghamtons plan to distribute propaganda leaflets to the enemy

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa injures his arm he sorely regrets that he stubbornly and secretly refused to join the rest of the family in taking out a group health insurance policy offered by the Grange

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Even after he is ordered to go on vacation Max follows the Choker to Casablanca

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is led to believe that Max is carrying a secret code

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Pamela Gerard escapes from a mental institution and hitches a ride with BJ and the Bear

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and his neighbor Roger are banished to the barn by their wives

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is stolen and hidden in a sorority house basement Its Wilbur dressed in drag to the rescue

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Carlos plays a repossession prank that almost lands Matt and Froy in jail Lou tasks Froy with burying the hatchet

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy deal with an unbalanced debtor who threatens to take down the entire company while Matt and Ronnie take on childrens book vendors who are up to no good

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Miracle of the White Stallions
programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Contact is made with the planet Piri where the main computer created an idyllic life that led to extinction of its population through apathy Now John Koenig must fight to save Alpha as his people fall under the same fate

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 203
programme.desc: Hercules 203

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A shuttle crashes on a beach after being pursued by a second Taelon piloted shuttle When Liam locates the survivor a Taelon called Belleye he claims to want to help the Resistance take back Earth from the Taelons

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens organise a series of armoured car heists in order to finance the purchase of rubies for their new laser weapons Meanwhile Ironhorse is kidnapped by the vengeful husband of a woman who had accidentally been shot dead by Ironhorse himself during a raid on a research installation that had been invaded by aliens

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: The Swamp Maiden seduces Obo before turning him into a monster

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble breaks jail with a friendly simple-minded young man and finds out the man may have been falsely blamed for a crime he did not commit years ago

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A dying prisoner asks his son to kill the two people whose testimony caused his death a Stockton banker named Clark and Victoria Barkley After Clark is murdered Jarrod unaware that Victoria is the next target agrees to act as the sons lawyer when he is put on trial for murder

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Looking for a job Cheyenne rides into town and is caught up in a fight and witnesses a bank holdup Deputized he catches the robber but is conflicted when the fugitive saves him from a bear trap that almost kills him

programme.title: Young 317
programme.desc: Young 317

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Terrorists take several people hostage including Keller Stone has to deal with not only the terrorists but a journalist whos sympathetic to their cause and a vengeful father whose daughter was killed

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF is tasked with defamation of Janos Karq a dangerous politician from the Eastern Block who intends to start a war with the West Joseph Baresh will be placed in the military prison Lubjanka where his testimonies shall implicate Karq

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man signs up people to a magazine subscription showing them his Congressional Medal of Honor to prove his honesty However it is a scam as there is no magazine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working out of the juvenile division when they get called to a movie theater to investigate an attack on a high school student who had acid thrown on his back The suspect is another boy named Gerald Paulson who is emotionally disturbed Later Gerald has an argument with his stepfather and runs out of the house carrying a live hand grenade Eventually Friday and Gannon trail him to a house where a girl he attends high school with is throwing a party and he is holding them hostage and threatening to pull the pin It is now up to the two detectives to get the grenade out of his hands before he kills himself and seriously wounds several other people

programme.title: Bail Out

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 opens with a pro match between always threatening Zach Manywounds and Trenton Rowell, hungry for his first win. Following is Keegan ""the Condition"" Oliver vs. Hard Knocks newcomer, Vaz Lep. The main event of the evening is welterweight matchup between two exciting Hard Knocks veterans: Joel Powell vs. Adam Smith.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Chapman v. Scott MacDonald

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues with some hard hitting action in MMA! This episode features an amateur matchup between Joe Mapanda and debut Sheldon Williams. Following are pros Dusty Kramps vs. former Hard Knocks Amateur Champion, Devon Smith. Our final fight for the evening is a pro bout between dynamic fighters Justin Schmit and Vyron Phillips.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill s second-in-command is captured by the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kills toy reduces the human race to electrical impulses imprisoned within five crystal globes

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce pleads with Hercs former intergalactic commando leader General Zhest to help them fight Monster Minds The general is too afraid of Saw Boss and Jayce persuades Zhests son to join the fight Saw Boss poisons the water of the planet

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Saw Boss Audric is captured and one of many on board a slave ship Jayces root responds to Audrics and a disguised Jayce boards the slave ship in search of Audric Audrics friends mistakenly think Jayce is an enemy

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM uses mutated vines to overgrow Los Angeles in order to force California officials to pay a hefty ransom MASK must find an antidote for the seemingly unstoppable plants to foil Mayhems plan

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A lost Inca priest frozen in ice awakens with knowledge of El Dorado a city of gold hidden in the Andes mountains VENOM promptly kidnaps the priest and his god T-Bob to find the treasure MASK then attempts a daring rescue

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby
